# Strong

A simple wrapper component for rendering bold/strong text. Renders a `<strong>` HTML element.

## Import

```jsx
import { Strong } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | - | The text content to render in bold |
| `ref` | `React.Ref` | - | Forwarded ref to the underlying element |

All standard Chakra UI style props are also supported.

## Usage

### Basic

```jsx
<Text>
  This is <Strong>important</Strong> text.
</Text>
```

### With style props

```jsx
<Strong color="red.600">Critical warning</Strong>
```

### In context

```jsx
<Text>
  Please <Strong>do not</Strong> share your password with anyone.
</Text>
```

## Features

- Renders a semantic `<strong>` HTML element for proper accessibility and SEO
- Supports all Chakra UI style props for additional styling
- Forwards refs to the underlying DOM element
- Lightweight wrapper with no additional overhead
